## Runtime.collectionContainsAny() function

Creates a filter that checks if a collection contains any of the values.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function collectionContainsAny<T, V>(values: V[], getter: (item: T) => ReadonlyArray<V> | undefined): FilterPredicate<T>;
```
